# Task: Upgrade the Docusaurus Site Polish

Improve the Docusaurus documentation site while keeping the product identity, package scope, and docs information architecture coherent.

## Focus areas

- homepage clarity and hero messaging
- sidebar readability and category styling
- config/rule docs discoverability
- docs-site branding consistency
- inspector/tooling links
- accessibility and responsive behavior

## Guardrails

- Do not invent fake public rules.
- Do not change package identity unless explicitly requested.
- Keep the site visually close to the template quality bar, but make the content accurate for the current Stylelint package.
- Prefer high-signal docs UI improvements over flashy decoration.

## Deliverable

At the end, provide:

- the UX/content issues you improved
- the specific docs-site files you changed
- how you validated the result
- any follow-up design or information-architecture work that remains
